Perfect! Now I have a complete understanding of the architecture. Let me compile this into a comprehensive report:

## Complete Architecture Overview: All Together Now

### 1. DIRECTORY STRUCTURE

```
all-together-now/
├── Cargo.toml                  (workspace root)
├── agents.toml                 (project config with agent definitions)
├── Cargo.lock
├── crates/
│   ├── atn-core/              (Core types and traits)
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── lib.rs         (module exports)
│   │       ├── agent.rs       (AgentId, AgentConfig, AgentState, AgentRole, AgentStatus)
│   │       ├── config.rs      (ProjectConfig, AgentEntry, ProjectMeta)
│   │       ├── event.rs       (InputEvent, OutputSignal, PushEvent, CannedAction)
│   │       ├── error.rs       (AtnError, Result type)
│   │       ├── controller.rs  (PgmController trait)
│   │       └── inbox.rs       (InboxMessage, constants)
│   │
│   ├── atn-pty/               (PTY session management)
│   │   ├── Cargo.toml
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   ├── lib.rs         (module exports)
│   │   │   ├── session.rs     (PtySession - individual agent session)
│   │   │   ├── manager.rs     (SessionManager - manages multiple sessions)
│   │   │   ├── state_tracker.rs (spawns state tracking task)
│   │   │   ├── reader.rs      (spawns PTY reader task)
│   │   │   ├── writer.rs      (spawns PTY writer task)
│   │   │   └── transcript.rs  (TranscriptWriter - logs output and events)
│   │   └── tests/
│   │       └── integration.rs (tests for session lifecycle)
│   │
│   ├── atn-server/            (HTTP API server)
│   │   ├── Cargo.toml
│   │   ├── src/
│   │   │   └── main.rs        (Axum server with REST/SSE endpoints)
│   │   └── static/
│   │       └── index.html     (web UI with xterm.js)
│   │
│   ├── atn-wiki/              (Wiki storage and coordination)
│   │   ├── Cargo.toml
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── lib.rs         (module exports)
│   │       ├── coordination.rs (seeding and appending to coord pages)
│   │       └── storage.rs     (FileWikiStorage implementation)
│   │
│   ├── atn-trail/             (Agentrail/saga reader)
│   │   ├── Cargo.toml
│   │   └── src/
│   │       ├── lib.rs         (module exports)
│   │       ├── reader.rs      (SagaConfig, StepConfig, Trajectory, loaders)
│   │       └── cli.rs
│   │
│   └── atn-ui/                (Yew-based web UI - not yet fully explored)
│       ├── Cargo.toml
│       ├── index.html
│       ├── Trunk.toml
│       └── src/
│           ├── lib.rs
│           ├── main.rs
│           ├── app.rs
│           └── wiki.rs
└── docs/                      (documentation)
```

---

### 2. KEY TYPES AND STRUCTURES

#### **atn-core/src/agent.rs**
```rust
pub struct AgentId(pub String);                    // Unique agent identifier
pub struct AgentConfig {                           // Spawning configuration
    pub id: AgentId,
    pub name: String,
    pub repo_path: PathBuf,
    pub role: AgentRole,
    pub setup_commands: Vec<String>,
    pub launch_command: String,
}
pub enum AgentRole { Developer, QA, PM, Coordinator }
pub enum AgentState {
    Starting,
    Running,
    AwaitingHumanInput,
    Busy,
    Blocked { on: Vec<String> },
    Idle,
    CompletedTask,
    Error { message: String },
    Disconnected,
}
pub struct AgentStatus {
    pub config: AgentConfig,
    pub state: AgentState,
    pub last_output_at: Option<String>,
    pub pending_requests: Vec<PushEvent>,
    pub current_task: Option<String>,
    pub saga_step: Option<(u32, String)>,
}
```

#### **atn-core/src/event.rs**
```rust
pub enum InputEvent {
    HumanText { text: String },
    RawBytes { bytes: Vec<u8> },
    CoordinatorCommand { command: String },
    Action { action: CannedAction },
}

pub enum CannedAction {
    CtrlC,
    ClaudeGo,
    ReadWiki { page: String },
    Ack { request_id: String },
}

pub enum OutputSignal {
    Bytes(Vec<u8>),
    PromptReady,
    QuestionDetected { snippet: String },
    IdleDetected,
    PushEvent(PushEvent),
}

pub struct PushEvent {
    pub id: String,
    pub kind: PushKind,
    pub source_agent: String,
    pub source_repo: String,
    pub target_agent: Option<String>,
    pub issue_id: Option<String>,
    pub summary: String,
    pub wiki_link: Option<String>,
    pub priority: Priority,
    pub timestamp: String,
}

pub enum PushKind {
    FeatureRequest,
    BugFixRequest,
    CompletionNotice,
    BlockedNotice,
    NeedsInfo,
    VerificationRequest,
}

pub enum Priority {
    Normal,
    High,
    Blocking,
}
```

#### **atn-core/src/config.rs**
```rust
pub struct ProjectConfig {
    pub project: ProjectMeta,
    pub agents: Vec<AgentEntry>,
}

pub struct ProjectMeta {
    pub name: String,
    pub log_dir: Option<PathBuf>,
}

pub struct AgentEntry {
    pub id: String,
    pub name: String,
    pub repo_path: String,
    pub role: AgentRole,               // defaults to Developer
    pub setup_commands: Vec<String>,
    pub launch_command: String,
}

// Loaded from agents.toml via TOML deserialization
pub fn load_project_config(path: &Path) -> Result<ProjectConfig>
```

---

### 3. PTY SESSION MANAGEMENT

#### **atn-pty/src/session.rs - PtySession**
```rust
pub struct PtySession {
    agent_id: AgentId,
    agent_name: String,
    agent_role: String,
    child: Box<dyn portable_pty::Child + Send>,
    input_tx: mpsc::Sender<InputEvent>,
    output_tx: broadcast::Sender<OutputSignal>,
    state: Arc<RwLock<AgentState>>,
    _master: Box<dyn MasterPty + Send>,
    _reader_handle: tokio::task::JoinHandle<()>,
    _writer_handle: tokio::task::JoinHandle<()>,
    _transcript_handle: Option<tokio::task::JoinHandle<()>>,
    _state_tracker_handle: tokio::task::JoinHandle<()>,
}

impl PtySession {
    pub async fn spawn(config: &AgentConfig, log_dir: Option<PathBuf>) -> Result<Self>
    pub fn agent_id(&self) -> &AgentId
    pub fn name(&self) -> &str
    pub fn role(&self) -> &str
    pub fn input_sender(&self) -> mpsc::Sender<InputEvent>
    pub async fn send_input(&self, event: InputEvent) -> Result<()>
    pub async fn send_ctrl_c(&self) -> Result<()>
    pub fn output_receiver(&self) -> broadcast::Receiver<OutputSignal>
    pub fn state(&self) -> Arc<RwLock<AgentState>>
    pub async fn shutdown(&mut self) -> Result<()>
}

// PTY Configuration
const PTY_ROWS: u16 = 40;
const PTY_COLS: u16 = 120;
const OUTPUT_CHANNEL_CAPACITY: usize = 256;
const INPUT_CHANNEL_CAPACITY: usize = 64;

// Initialization flow:
// 1. Opens PTY pair via portable_pty
// 2. Spawns bash shell in PTY
// 3. Spawns reader task (reads from PTY master)
// 4. Spawns writer task (writes input events to PTY)
// 5. Spawns transcript writer (logs output and events)
// 6. Spawns state tracker (monitors output for state changes)
// 7. Injects setup_commands and launch_command via InputEvent::CoordinatorCommand
// 8. Sets state to Running once complete
```

#### **atn-pty/src/manager.rs - SessionManager**
```rust
pub struct SessionManager {
    sessions: HashMap<AgentId, PtySession>,
    log_dir: Option<PathBuf>,
}

impl SessionManager {
    pub fn new(log_dir: Option<PathBuf>) -> Self
    pub async fn spawn_agent(&mut self, config: AgentConfig) -> Result<AgentId>
    pub fn get_session(&self, id: &AgentId) -> Result<&PtySession>
    pub fn get_session_mut(&mut self, id: &AgentId) -> Result<&mut PtySession>
    pub async fn shutdown_agent(&mut self, id: &AgentId) -> Result<()>
    pub async fn shutdown_all(&mut self) -> Result<()>
    pub fn agent_ids(&self) -> Vec<&AgentId>
    pub fn len(&self) -> usize
    pub fn is_empty(&self) -> bool
}
```

---

### 4. STATE TRACKING

#### **atn-pty/src/state_tracker.rs**
```rust
const IDLE_TIMEOUT: Duration = Duration::from_secs(5);
const PROMPT_MARKER: &[u8] = b"__ATN_READY__>";
const QUESTION_MARKERS: &[&[u8]] = &[b"? ", b"(y/n)", b"[Y/n]", b"[y/N]"];

pub fn spawn_state_tracker(
    rx: broadcast::Receiver<OutputSignal>,
    state: Arc<RwLock<AgentState>>,
) -> JoinHandle<()>

// State transitions:
// - Bytes with prompt marker → Idle
// - Bytes with question markers → AwaitingHumanInput
// - Bytes (general) → Running
// - No output for IDLE_TIMEOUT → Idle (only from Running)
// - OutputSignal::PromptReady → Idle
// - OutputSignal::QuestionDetected → AwaitingHumanInput
// - OutputSignal::IdleDetected → Idle (only from Running)
```

---

### 5. INPUT/OUTPUT HANDLING

#### **atn-pty/src/reader.rs**
```rust
const READ_BUF_SIZE: usize = 8192;

pub fn spawn_reader_task(
    reader: Box<dyn Read + Send>,
    tx: broadcast::Sender<OutputSignal>,
) -> JoinHandle<()>

// Spawns blocking task that:
// 1. Reads from PTY master in 8KB chunks
// 2. Emits OutputSignal::Bytes for each chunk
// 3. Stops on EOF or read error
```

#### **atn-pty/src/writer.rs**
```rust
pub fn spawn_writer_task(
    writer: Box<dyn Write + Send>,
    rx: mpsc::Receiver<InputEvent>,
) -> JoinHandle<()>

fn input_event_to_bytes(event: &InputEvent) -> Vec<u8> {
    InputEvent::HumanText { text }          → text + "\n"
    InputEvent::RawBytes { bytes }          → bytes as-is
    InputEvent::CoordinatorCommand { cmd }  → cmd + "\n"
    InputEvent::Action { action }           → canned_action_to_bytes(action)
}

fn canned_action_to_bytes(action: &CannedAction) -> Vec<u8> {
    CtrlC                       → vec![0x03]
    ClaudeGo                    → "claude go\n"
    ReadWiki { page }           → "coord read {page}\n"
    Ack { request_id }          → "coord ack {request_id}\n"
}

// Spawns blocking task that:
// 1. Waits for InputEvent on mpsc channel
// 2. Converts to bytes
// 3. Writes all bytes to PTY master
// 4. Flushes and stops on error
```

#### **atn-pty/src/transcript.rs**
```rust
pub struct TranscriptWriter {
    transcript_path: PathBuf,
    events_path: PathBuf,
}

impl TranscriptWriter {
    pub fn new(agent_dir: &Path) -> Result<Self>
    pub fn spawn(self, rx: broadcast::Receiver<OutputSignal>) -> JoinHandle<()>
}

// Creates two files per agent:
// - {agent_dir}/transcript.log      (raw bytes)
// - {agent_dir}/events.jsonl        (structured events)

// Logs:
// OutputSignal::Bytes               → appended to transcript.log
// OutputSignal::PromptReady         → JSON event to events.jsonl
// OutputSignal::QuestionDetected    → JSON event with snippet
// OutputSignal::IdleDetected        → JSON event
// OutputSignal::PushEvent           → JSON event with full PushEvent
```

---

### 6. SERVER API (atn-server/src/main.rs)

#### **Axum Server**
Runs on `0.0.0.0:7500` with CORS enabled.

**Routes:**

| Method | Path | Handler | Returns |
|--------|------|---------|---------|
| GET | `/` | `index_handler` | HTML (static/index.html) |
| GET | `/api/agents` | `list_agents` | `Json<Vec<AgentInfo>>` |
| GET | `/api/agents/{id}/state` | `agent_state` | `Json<AgentInfo>` |
| GET | `/api/agents/{id}/sse` | `agent_sse` | `Sse<Stream<Event>>` (base64 encoded bytes) |
| POST | `/api/agents/{id}/input` | `agent_input` | `StatusCode::OK` |
| POST | `/api/agents/{id}/ctrl-c` | `agent_ctrl_c` | `StatusCode::OK` |
| GET | `/api/wiki` | `wiki_list_pages` | `Json<Vec<String>>` |
| GET | `/api/wiki/{title}` | `wiki_get_page` | `Json<WikiPageResponse>` + ETag header |
| PUT | `/api/wiki/{title}` | `wiki_put_page` | Create/update with If-Match validation |
| PATCH | `/api/wiki/{title}` | `wiki_patch_page` | Structured patch operations |
| DELETE | `/api/wiki/{title}` | `wiki_delete_page` | Requires If-Match header |

**Key Types:**
```rust
struct AgentInfo {
    id: String,
    name: String,
    role: String,
    state: AgentState,
}

struct WikiPageResponse {
    title: String,
    content: String,
    html: String,
    created_at: u64,
    updated_at: u64,
}

struct InputPayload {
    text: String,
}
```

#### **Initialization Flow**
```rust
1. Loads agents.toml from config path
2. Spawns SessionManager with optional log_dir
3. For each AgentEntry in config, spawns agent via manager
4. Initializes wiki storage at .atn/wiki/
5. Seeds coordination pages (Goals, Agents, Requests, Blockers, Log)
6. Starts Axum server listening on port 7500
```

---

### 7. WIKI SYSTEM

#### **atn-wiki/src/storage.rs - FileWikiStorage**
```rust
pub struct FileWikiStorage {
    dir: PathBuf,
}

// Each page is stored as:
// - {title}.md          (content file)
// - {title}.meta.json   (metadata: created_at, updated_at)

// Title sanitization:
// - Replace "/" with "__"
// - Keep only alphanumeric, "-", "_"

// Implements AsyncWikiStorage trait:
pub async fn get_page(&self, title: &str) -> Option<WikiPage>
pub async fn save_page(&self, page: WikiPage)
pub async fn delete_page(&self, title: &str)
pub async fn list_pages(&self) -> Vec<String>
pub async fn has_page(&self, title: &str) -> bool
```

#### **atn-wiki/src/coordination.rs**
```rust
pub const GOALS_PAGE: &str = "Coordination/Goals";
pub const AGENTS_PAGE: &str = "Coordination/Agents";
pub const REQUESTS_PAGE: &str = "Coordination/Requests";
pub const BLOCKERS_PAGE: &str = "Coordination/Blockers";
pub const LOG_PAGE: &str = "Coordination/Log";

pub async fn seed_coordination_pages(storage: &dyn AsyncWikiStorage, now: u64)
pub async fn append_log(storage: &dyn AsyncWikiStorage, entry: &str, timestamp: &str, now: u64)
```

---

### 8. WEB UI (static/index.html)

**Architecture:**
- Vanilla JavaScript (no framework)
- xterm.js for terminal emulation
- Tab-based navigation (Agents / Wiki)

**Features:**

**Agents Tab:**
- Agent panels in responsive grid (1-3 columns based on count)
- Each panel shows:
  - Agent name and role
  - Connection status (green/red dot)
  - Agent state badge with color coding
  - xterm terminal
  - Input box for commands
  - Send and Ctrl-C buttons
- Real-time output via SSE from `/api/agents/{id}/sse`
- Base64-encoded bytes decoded back to display text
- State polling every 2 seconds via `/api/agents`

**Wiki Tab:**
- Sidebar with list of pages
- Main view area with toolbar
- Read/edit modes
- ETag-based conflict detection
- Create new pages
- Wiki link navigation (internal links)

**Colors:**
- Background: #1a1a2e (dark)
- Accent: #e94560 (red/pink)
- Green success: #4ecca3
- Text: #e0e0e0

---

### 9. agents.toml FORMAT

```toml
[project]
name = "all-together-now"
log_dir = ".atn/logs"

[[agent]]
id = "alice"
name = "Alice (Frontend)"
repo_path = "."
role = "developer"
launch_command = "bash"

[[agent]]
id = "bob"
name = "Bob (Backend)"
repo_path = "."
role = "developer"
launch_command = "bash"

[[agent]]
id = "carol"
name = "Carol (QA)"
repo_path = "."
role = "qa"
launch_command = "bash"
```

**Fields:**
- `[project].name` - project name
- `[project].log_dir` - relative path for logging (created if provided)
- `[[agent]]` array with:
  - `id` - unique agent identifier
  - `name` - display name
  - `repo_path` - working directory (relative to config, or absolute)
  - `role` - "developer", "qa", "pm", "coordinator" (defaults to "developer")
  - `setup_commands` - list of shell commands to run before launch
  - `launch_command` - command to launch (defaults to empty, injected as CoordinatorCommand)

---

### 10. RUNTIME COMMAND INJECTION

When spawning an agent, the server injects commands via `InputEvent::CoordinatorCommand`:

```
1. Set PS1 prompt:  export PS1="__ATN_READY__> "
2. For each setup_command: inject it
3. If launch_command non-empty: inject it
4. Wait a moment, then set state to Running
```

This allows the state tracker to reliably detect when the agent is ready for input.

---

### 11. MESSAGE ROUTING & EVENTS

#### **Existing Routing Patterns**

**Input Flow:**
- Human types in web UI → POST `/api/agents/{id}/input` with `{text}`
- InputEvent::HumanText { text } → Queue on mpsc
- Writer task sends to PTY: `text\n`

**Output Flow:**
- Reader task reads from PTY → emits OutputSignal::Bytes
- Multiple subscribers (broadcast):
  - State tracker (updates AgentState)
  - Transcript writer (logs output)
  - Web UI via SSE endpoint (sends as base64)

**Coordination Events:**
PushEvent is defined but not yet actively routed in the core system:
- Generated in OutputSignal::PushEvent variant
- Logged to events.jsonl when detected
- Stored in AgentStatus.pending_requests field

**CannedActions** provide pre-built workflows:

const IDLE_TIMEOUT: Duration = Duration::from_secs(5);
const PROMPT_MARKER: &[u8] = b"__ATN_READY__>";
const QUESTION_MARKERS: &[&[u8]] = &[b"? ", b"(y/n)", b"[Y/n]", b"[y/N]"];

pub fn spawn_state_tracker(
    rx: broadcast::Receiver<OutputSignal>,
    state: Arc<RwLock<AgentState>>,
) -> JoinHandle<()>

// State transitions:
// - Bytes with prompt marker → Idle
// - Bytes with question markers → AwaitingHumanInput
// - Bytes (general) → Running
// - No output for IDLE_TIMEOUT → Idle (only from Running)
// - OutputSignal::PromptReady → Idle
// - OutputSignal::QuestionDetected → AwaitingHumanInput
// - OutputSignal::IdleDetected → Idle (only from Running)

    reader: Box<dyn Read + Send>,
    tx: broadcast::Sender<OutputSignal>,
) -> JoinHandle<()>

// 1. Reads from PTY master in 8KB chunks
// 2. Emits OutputSignal::Bytes for each chunk

```rust
pub fn spawn_writer_task(
    writer: Box<dyn Write + Send>,
    rx: mpsc::Receiver<InputEvent>,
) -> JoinHandle<()>

fn input_event_to_bytes(event: &InputEvent) -> Vec<u8> {
    InputEvent::HumanText { text }          → text + "\n"
    InputEvent::RawBytes { bytes }          → bytes as-is
    InputEvent::CoordinatorCommand { cmd }  → cmd + "\n"
    InputEvent::Action { action }           → canned_action_to_bytes(action)
}

fn canned_action_to_bytes(action: &CannedAction) -> Vec<u8> {
    CtrlC                       → vec![0x03]
    ClaudeGo                    → "claude go\n"
    ReadWiki { page }           → "coord read {page}\n"
    Ack { request_id }          → "coord ack {request_id}\n"
}

// Spawns blocking task that:
// 1. Waits for InputEvent on mpsc channel
// 2. Converts to bytes
// 3. Writes all bytes to PTY master
// 4. Flushes and stops on error
```

  - `role` - "developer", "qa", "pm", "coordinator" (defaults to "developer")

### 10. RUNTIME COMMAND INJECTION

When spawning an agent, the server injects commands via `InputEvent::CoordinatorCommand`:

```
1. Set PS1 prompt:  export PS1="__ATN_READY__> "
2. For each setup_command: inject it
3. If launch_command non-empty: inject it
4. Wait a moment, then set state to Running
```

This allows the state tracker to reliably detect when the agent is ready for input.

### 11. MESSAGE ROUTING & EVENTS

#### **Existing Routing Patterns**

**Input Flow:**
- Human types in web UI → POST `/api/agents/{id}/input` with `{text}`
- InputEvent::HumanText { text } → Queue on mpsc
- Writer task sends to PTY: `text\n`

**Output Flow:**
- Reader task reads from PTY → emits OutputSignal::Bytes
- Multiple subscribers (broadcast):
  - State tracker (updates AgentState)
  - Transcript writer (logs output)
  - Web UI via SSE endpoint (sends as base64)

**Coordination Events:**
PushEvent is defined but not yet actively routed in the core system:
- Generated in OutputSignal::PushEvent variant
- Logged to events.jsonl when detected
- Stored in AgentStatus.pending_requests field

**CannedActions** provide pre-built workflows:
- `ClaudeGo` → sends "claude go\n"
- `ReadWiki { page }` → sends "coord read {page}\n"
- `Ack { request_id }` → sends "coord ack {request_id}\n"

use crate::agent::AgentId;

/// ATN error type.
#[derive(Debug, thiserror::Error)]
pub enum AtnError {
    #[error("PTY error: {0}")]
    Pty(String),

    #[error("I/O error: {0}")]
    Io(#[from] std::io::Error),

    #[error("JSON error: {0}")]
    Json(#[from] serde_json::Error),

    #[error("TOML deserialization error: {0}")]
    TomlDeser(#[from] toml::de::Error),

    #[error("agent not found: {0}")]
    AgentNotFound(AgentId),

    #[error("agent not ready for input: {0}")]
    AgentNotReady(AgentId),

    #[error("wiki error: {0}")]
    Wiki(String),

    #[error("trail error: {0}")]
    Trail(String),

    #[error("inbox error: {0}")]
    Inbox(String),

    #[error("channel send error: {0}")]
    Channel(String),
}

/// ATN result type.
pub type Result<T> = std::result::Result<T, AtnError>;

Phase 5: Message routing with outbox polling, event log, and Events UI

- Add atn-core router module with RouteDecision enum and route_event logic
- Add server-side MessageRouter: polls .atn/outboxes/ for PushEvent JSON files,
  routes to known agents (PTY inject + inbox write), escalates unknown targets
  to wiki Requests page, broadcasts untargeted events to coordination log
- Add REST endpoints: GET /api/events (with ?since= polling), POST /api/events
  for manual event submission
- Add Events tab to web UI with event cards, escalation banners, kind/decision
  badges, and 5-second auto-polling for new events
- 3 new unit tests for routing decisions (known/unknown/broadcast)
- Zero clippy warnings, all 32 tests pass

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
